sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41133" key="e)pisuna/rxomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισυν-άρχομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41133.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">begin together with,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινί</foreign> Hippodam. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.39.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
